visual_identity.density: medium-dense with compact controls, large hero moments, and high information density in docs
visual_identity.corner_style: dominantly sharp and square in product surfaces; shadcn library components retain rounded-md/lg defaults
visual_identity.elevation_style: border-led elevation with sparse shadows, glow-on-hover, and offset duplicate-border CTA treatment
visual_identity.contrast_profile: high contrast black/white base with gray hierarchy and limited semantic status color
notes: Requested context files under input/ and outputs/ were not present in the checkout; profile is based on direct inspection of app/page.tsx, app/docs/page.tsx, app/globals.css, styles/globals.css, components.json, and components/ui/*.
Landing and docs pages use bg-black text-white font-mono directly, overriding the more general shadcn neutral token system.
Visual signature comes from ASCII art, terminal panels, window-control dots, command snippets, matrix characters, scan/glow animation, and monochrome borders.

non_negotiable_traits: monospace product UI for terminal/CLI surfaces
white primary text with gray secondary hierarchy
hover states brighten borders/text rather than introducing new color families
green/red/yellow reserved for terminal status and window controls
adaptable_traits: shadcn components may use rounded-md/lg defaults when outside bespoke terminal surfaces
accent gradients are allowed only as white-to-gray text or subtle gray panel backplates
blue may appear in shell prompt/path text but should not become a primary brand color
animations may be pulsing, blinking, scanning, typing, or matrix-like when they reinforce the terminal metaphor
adaptation_notes: Prefer page-level terminal aesthetic over default shadcn styling for product-facing screens.
Where a component exists only in components/ui and is not used by pages, confidence is lower and source_basis states library implementation.

colors.primary: white / text-white / bg-white for primary CTA
colors.secondary: gray-400 for secondary text and navigation
colors.accent: gray-900, gray-800, gray-700, gray-600 border/surface accents
colors.success: green-400 / green-500 for status dots, copied state, active availability
colors.warning: yellow-500 for terminal window dot and pending status
colors.danger: red-500 for terminal window dot; shadcn destructive token oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325)
colors.background: bg-black; token --background defaults to oklch(1 0 0) light and oklch(0.145 0 0) dark
colors.border: border-gray-800 primary section dividers; border-gray-700 panels; border-gray-600/500 hover; border-white active CTA

spacing.grouping_pattern: large centered sections with max-width containers; terminal panels use header/body split; docs use fixed sidebar plus content stack
spacing.adaptation_rule: Use p-6 for panels/cards, px-6 lg:px-12 for page gutters, max-w-7xl for landing sections, max-w-4xl/5xl for terminal and docs content.

radius.control: product CTAs and command blocks are square; shadcn controls default rounded-md
radius.container: product panels/cards are mostly square; shadcn Card default rounded-xl
radius.sharp_allowed: yes; preferred for product-facing terminal surfaces
radius.style_rule: Default to no radius for terminal panels, code blocks, cards, and CTAs; allow rounded-md/lg only when using stock shadcn primitives or status dots.

font_families: Courier New / Monaco / Menlo for terminal-text utility

breakpoints: mobile menu below md/lg depending page

hierarchy.primary_focus_pattern: centered hero with ASCII masthead, large bold headline, install CTA, and live terminal simulator
hierarchy.secondary_content_pattern: terminal-window sections with command headers, rows, status metadata, and centered section headers
hierarchy.cta_hierarchy: primary: white filled offset install command; secondary: dashed outline documentation link; tertiary: inline command copy rows/text links
emphasis_rules: Use gray-400 for explanatory copy and inactive navigation.
Use gray-500/600 for metadata and low-priority terminal chrome.
Use border brightness changes for hover/selection.
Use green only for success/online/copied/active status.
grouping_rules: Terminal panels group content with gray-900 header, gray-700 divider, and black body.
Docs content groups each topic in bg-gray-950 border-gray-800 p-6 blocks.
Repeated command rows are black bordered strips with copy affordance on the right.
Feature cards use numbered square markers and command snippets as anchors.
hierarchy.contrast_usage: Very high contrast for foreground and CTAs; gray hierarchy distinguishes metadata, descriptions, inactive items, and borders.

typography_roles.page_title: text-4xl lg:text-6xl font-bold leading-tight on landing; text-4xl font-bold in docs
typography_roles.section_title: text-3xl/lg:text-4xl or text-4xl/lg:text-5xl font-bold with centered alignment on landing; text-2xl font-bold in docs panels
typography_roles.body: text-lg or text-xl for landing explanatory copy; text-gray-400 body copy in docs
typography_roles.supporting_text: text-sm/text-xs gray-400/500 for metadata, descriptions, status labels, and command hints
typography_roles.label: font-medium or font-bold, often text-white; sidebar labels use text-sm and active border/background
typography_roles.caption: text-xs gray-500 for terminal status, version, availability, command metadata
typography_roles.scanning_behavior: Users scan from white headings to gray descriptions to bordered command blocks; monospace rows and bracketed numbers support quick terminal-like parsing.

interaction.hover: text gray-400 to white, border gray-700/600 to gray-500/white, subtle gray background, shadow-white glow, and occasional translate offset reset
interaction.focus: shadcn primitives use focus-visible:border-ring and focus-visible:ring-ring/50 ring-[3px]; dialogs close button uses focus:ring-2 ring-offset
interaction.active: docs active sidebar items use bg-gray-900 border-gray-600 text-white; selected shadcn rows/items use data-state styles
interaction.selected: selected rows/items use bg-muted or bg-gray-900 with stronger border; select/menu items show check/circle indicators
interaction.disabled: shadcn controls use disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50; select adds disabled:cursor-not-allowed
interaction.loading: terminal simulator uses bouncing dots, Processing text, blinking cursor, pulsing status dots, and timed command/output sequences
interaction.validation: form/input/select/button primitives support aria-invalid:border-destructive and destructive ring; FormMessage renders text-destructive text-sm
interaction.feedback_style: copy actions swap Copy icon to green Check for 2 seconds; success terminal lines render green; hover feedback is immediate via transition-colors/transition-all

layout.page_shell: black full-height shell with sticky top nav and terminal/matrix background on landing; docs shell uses sticky nav, left sidebar, and content main
layout.page_width_strategy: max-w-7xl for broad landing content, max-w-4xl for terminal/docs reading, max-w-5xl for CTA section, centered mx-auto containers
layout.header_pattern: sticky bg-gray-950/95 nav with border-b, backdrop-blur-sm, logo/window dots, hidden desktop links, and command/install action
layout.section_spacing: landing sections use px-6 py-16/20 lg:px-12 with border-t dividers; docs uses p-6 lg:p-12 content padding
grid_rules: feature cards use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6
IDE list uses grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4
docs default cards use md:grid-cols-2 gap-6
matrix background uses custom grid-cols-25 increasing at md/lg
navigation_patterns: desktop landing nav shows inline anchors with underline-on-hover
mobile landing shows hamburger icon only
docs mobile uses off-canvas sidebar with overlay
docs desktop sidebar is fixed/static left navigation with nested items
responsive_rules: CTAs stack flex-col on mobile and become sm:flex-row.
Long command text uses break-all on small screens where needed.
Sidebar is translated offscreen on mobile and static on lg.
Landing terminal/list footers switch from column to row at md.

buttons.source_basis: components/ui/button.tsx plus custom CTA div/button patterns in app/page.tsx and app/docs/page.tsx

rules.appearance: stock Button is rounded-md with variants; product CTAs are square bordered blocks, often offset over a secondary border layer
rules.spacing: stock h-8/h-9/h-10 px-3/4/6; product CTAs use px-6 to px-16 and py-2 to py-5
rules.radius: rounded-md in stock component; no radius in product CTAs
rules.border: primary product CTA uses border-white; secondary uses border-2 border-dashed gray-400/600; hover strengthens to white
rules.shadow: stock outline has shadow-xs; product hover uses shadow-lg/shadow-white/20
rules.typography: text-sm font-medium stock; font-bold monospace product CTA
rules.states: hover background/border/text transitions, disabled opacity-50 in stock, focus-visible ring in stock, copied state swaps icon to Check

rules.purpose: text/file input primitive for forms and sidebar search contexts
rules.appearance: transparent bg, border-input, shadow-xs, placeholder muted, full width
rules.states: focus-visible ring-[3px], disabled opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed, invalid destructive ring/border

rules.purpose: compact option selection with Radix Select
rules.appearance: transparent bordered trigger, popover content with bg-popover border shadow-md
rules.spacing: trigger h-9 px-3 py-2 default, h-8 sm; content p-1; item py-1.5 pl-2 pr-8
rules.states: focus-visible ring-[3px], disabled opacity-50, invalid destructive, open/closed fade/zoom/slide animations, selected item check indicator

rules.purpose: menus, checkbox/radio menu items, nested submenus, shortcuts
rules.appearance: bg-popover text-popover-foreground bordered menu with compact item rows
rules.spacing: content p-1 min-w-8rem; items px-2 py-1.5 gap-2
rules.typography: text-sm items/labels; shortcut text-xs tracking-widest muted
rules.states: focus:bg-accent, data-state=open accent on subtrigger, disabled opacity-50, destructive item variant, open/closed fade/zoom/slide animations

cards.source_basis: components/ui/card.tsx plus terminal/product panels in app/page.tsx and docs page topic blocks

rules.purpose: group related content, terminal windows, docs topics, feature steps
rules.appearance: product cards/panels are bg-gray-950 or bg-black with gray borders; stock Card uses bg-card rounded-xl border shadow-sm
rules.spacing: stock py-6 gap-6 px-6 inner parts; product p-6 with gap-4/6 and section mb-12/16
rules.radius: product cards square; stock cards rounded-xl
rules.shadow: terminal panels shadow-xl/2xl; feature cards hover shadow-white/10; stock shadow-sm
rules.typography: card titles font-bold/semibold; descriptions gray-400 text-sm
rules.states: hover:border-white or gray-500, hover:bg-gray-900, hover shadow/glow, optional slight transform/backplate rotation

rules.appearance: full-width table inside overflow-x-auto container, border-separated rows via border-b
centered bg-background panel over bg-black/50 overlay
rules.spacing: gap-4 p-6, close button top-4 right-4
rules.typography: title text-lg font-semibold leading-none; description text-sm muted
rules.states: open/closed fade and zoom animations, close hover opacity-100, focus ring, disabled pointer-events-none

rules.appearance: same modal shell as Dialog with action/cancel buttons
rules.spacing: content gap-4 p-6; footer gap-2 column-reverse on mobile, row at sm
rules.typography: title text-lg font-semibold; description text-sm muted
rules.states: open/closed fade and zoom animations; actions inherit Button states
variants: destructive via button variant when supplied

rules.purpose: documentation navigation and reusable collapsible app navigation
rules.appearance: docs sidebar bg-gray-950 border-r gray-800; reusable sidebar uses bg-sidebar text-sidebar-foreground
rules.spacing: docs width w-80 p-6, section gaps space-y-6, item p-2/p-3; reusable width 16rem, mobile 18rem, icon 3rem
rules.radius: docs sidebar square; reusable floating variant rounded-lg
rules.border: border-r gray-800 docs; reusable border-sidebar-border for floating/side borders
rules.shadow: floating reusable sidebar shadow-sm; docs no shadow
rules.typography: section labels text-white font-medium; nested items text-sm gray-400
rules.states: mobile translate-x open/closed, overlay on mobile, active bg-gray-900 border-gray-600, hover border-gray-700 bg-gray-900, keyboard shortcut support in reusable provider

rules.appearance: inline bg-muted tab list with active trigger bg-background and optional shadow
rules.spacing: root gap-2; list h-9 p-[3px]; trigger px-2 py-1 gap-1.5
rules.border: transparent trigger border; active dark border-input
rules.states: data-state=active background/text/shadow, focus-visible ring-[3px], disabled opacity-50

badges.source_basis: components/ui/badge.tsx and inline docs model tags

rules.appearance: stock badge rounded-md border px-2 py-0.5; docs tags use bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 px-2 py-1
rules.spacing: px-2 py-0.5 stock; gap-1; docs px-2 py-1
rules.radius: rounded-md stock; docs tags appear square unless class adds radius
rules.border: transparent for filled variants; outline variant keeps border
rules.states: anchor badges hover background, focus-visible ring, invalid destructive support

rules.appearance: bordered rounded panel using bg-card text-card-foreground; optional icon grid
rules.border: default border with destructive text variant
rules.typography: text-sm; title font-medium tracking-tight; description text-sm muted

rules.appearance: flex column centered, text-balance, optional icon media
rules.spacing: gap-6 p-6 md:p-12; content gap-4; header gap-2
rules.typography: title text-lg font-medium tracking-tight; description text-sm/relaxed muted
rules.states: links in description underline and hover:text-primary

rules.purpose: Recharts responsive chart wrapper and tooltip/legend styling
rules.appearance: aspect-video flex container with muted axes/grid and tokenized series colors
rules.spacing: tooltip px-2.5 py-1.5 gap-1.5; chart container fills responsive area
rules.states: tooltip renders only when active payload exists; indicator supports dot/line/dashed

page_headers.source_basis: app/page.tsx hero/section headers and app/docs/page.tsx content headers

rules.purpose: orient page/section and establish primary message
rules.appearance: large white bold headings, centered on landing and left-aligned in docs content
rules.spacing: mb-4/6/8 after titles; header groups mb-12/16
rules.border: section headers often sit above bordered terminal blocks; no direct border
rules.shadow: ASCII/terminal glow classes available but headings mostly unshadowed
rules.typography: landing h1 text-4xl lg:text-6xl; section h2 text-3xl to text-5xl; docs h1 text-4xl
rules.states: some emphasized words animate-pulse or use white-to-gray text gradient

filters.source_basis: inferred from available Input, Select, DropdownMenu, Tabs, and Table primitives; no dedicated filter component or product filter UI observed

rules.purpose: filter rows should refine lists/tables without leaving terminal aesthetic
rules.appearance: transparent or black controls with gray borders, monospace labels, compact rows
rules.spacing: gap-2/3 controls, h-9 controls, p-4 wrapper if framed
rules.radius: square for product pages; rounded-md only if using stock primitives directly
rules.shadow: none unless dropdown/select popover uses shadow-md
rules.states: active filter should use bg-gray-900 border-gray-600 text-white; disabled opacity-50

rules.purpose: structured field composition with accessible descriptions and errors
rules.appearance: grid-based field stacks with labels, controls, muted descriptions, destructive messages
rules.spacing: FormItem grid gap-2; descriptions/messages directly under controls
rules.border: inherits control border and invalid destructive border
rules.typography: label inherits Label; description text-sm muted; message text-sm destructive
rules.states: aria-describedby and aria-invalid wired through FormControl; label data-error true turns destructive

ux_patterns.cta_hierarchy: Make the install command the strongest action: white filled, black text, offset border, copy feedback. Documentation/navigation actions use dashed or plain outline. Inline command rows act as tertiary copy actions.
ux_patterns.information_grouping: Group content into terminal-like panels with a chrome header, command body, status footer, and gray border. Docs group topics as stacked bordered blocks with headings, copyable commands, and option lists.
ux_patterns.filter_placement: No explicit filter UI observed. If added, place filters above the affected list/table as compact monospace control rows, not as detached cards.
ux_patterns.form_structure: Use FormItem grid gap-2 with label, control, optional muted description, and destructive message. Keep controls compact and full-width in narrow contexts.
ux_patterns.validation_behavior: Use aria-invalid destructive border/ring, destructive label/message, and preserve accessible describedby wiring from form primitives.
ux_patterns.table_detail_strategy: Tables should be horizontally scrollable, compact, row-hover highlighted, and selected rows use muted background; detail actions should appear as command-style rows or inline terminal links.
ux_patterns.loading_error_empty_states: Loading should feel terminal-native: blinking cursor, bouncing dots, Processing text, pulse status dots. Empty states use centered dashed bordered containers. Errors should use destructive alert/form variants but avoid expanding the palette.
ux_patterns.action_placement: Primary actions appear near section starts or terminal headers; copy actions sit at the right edge of command rows; docs navigation actions live in the left sidebar and close it on mobile.
notes: The product UI favors direct manipulation of command snippets over conventional form-heavy flows.
Animations are part of the identity but should remain low-amplitude and terminal-relevant.
Use borders and text contrast as the main hierarchy tools; avoid colorful fills except semantic status indicators.

constraints: Do not introduce broad new color families; preserve monochrome terminal identity.
Do not round terminal/product panels unless intentionally using stock shadcn primitives.
Do not use card elevation without borders; borders are the primary containment device.
Keep interactive feedback visible through text, border, icon, or transform changes.
Maintain responsive command readability; allow wrapping/breaking for long terminal strings on mobile.
Treat components/ui as reusable library evidence and app/page.tsx plus app/docs/page.tsx as product visual evidence.
